1500000001.korean: 네리는 역시… 이런 옷으로 밖에 다니기 부끄러워…
1500000001.english: I guess I'm still embarrassed to go out wearing something like this.

1500000002.korean: 그 테라피 치료사인가 뭔가 하는 마스크 쓴 애는 거의 옷을 안 입고 다니는데… 그래도 이 정도면 건전한 거 아냐, 네리?
1500000002.english: That therapist‑type with the mask barely wears any clothes… But this is still decent enough, right Neri?

1500000003.korean: 그런가? 하지만… 사령관이랑 있던 일 이후론… 이런 옷 입을 때마다 부끄럽단 말이야.
1500000003.english: Is that so? But ever since that thing with the Commander… I get embarrassed every time I wear something like this.

1500000004.korean: 카페 안에 있을 땐 잘만 입고 다녔으면서, 갑자기 왜 그래? 참나.
1500000004.english: You were fine dressing up in the café, so why the sudden change? Ugh.

1500000007.korean: 응? 별거 아냐. 그냥 생각 할 게 좀 있어서.
1500000007.english: Huh? Nothing special. Just have something on my mind.

1500000008.korean: 뭐야? 어제부터 표정 어두워지더니 자꾸 멍 때리고, 주문 실수하고.
1500000008.english: What’s up? You've been looking down since yesterday, spacing out, messing up orders.

1500000010.korean: 그, 그렇게 쳐다보면 뭐 어쩔 건데?!
1500000010.english: Hey, what are you gonna do if you keep staring like that?!

1500000011.korean: 야, 너네들 요새… 오르카 애들 사이에서 유행하는 메이크업 알아?
1500000011.english: Hey, you guys know that makeup trend that's popular among the Orca kids lately?

1500000012.korean: 메이크업? 그건 운디네가 잘 알긴 할텐데.
1500000012.english: Makeup? Undine would probably know more about that.

1500000014.korean: 며칠 전에 메이크업 해봤는데… 얼굴에 그림 그렸냐고 놀림 받아서…
1500000014.english: I tried makeup a few days ago… and got teased like I painted my face.

1500000015.english: Heh heh! The Commander would've freaked out if he saw it!

1500000016.korean: 놀리지 마... 나 오랜만에 하는 데이트라서 열심히 준비 했단 말이야.
1500000016.english: Stop teasing… I was gearing up for a date after ages, you know.

1500000017.korean: 근데 결국 맨얼굴로 데이트 하러가지 않았어 네리?
1500000017.english: But in the end you still went on the date with a bare face, right Neri?

1500000019.korean: 쓸데없이 안 하던 거 하면 어색하기만 하다니까? 네리도 항상 그랬듯, 했던 대로 하라고.
1500000019.english: Doing something you never did just makes it awkward, right? Like you always say, just stick to what you did.

1500000020.english: Hehe… I guess that's right, Thetis?

1500000021.korean: 근데 잘 보여서 나쁜 건 없잖아? 네리도 더 잘 보이고 싶은 마음이 있으니까 그랬겠지.
1500000021.english: But there's nothing wrong with looking good, right? You probably just wanted to be seen more.

1500000022.english: …Neri, it was my first time doing makeup.

1500000023.korean: 왜 처음 화장하는 애를 그렇게 놀렸어? 트라우마 생겼겠다.
1500000023.english: Why tease a newbie like that? You must've given her a trauma.

1500000024.korean: 참나, 원래 네리는 화장 안 한 게 더 예뻐! 기껏 뜯어 말려줬더니 진짜…
1500000024.english: Honestly, you look prettier without makeup! I tried to pull you back, but…

1500000025.korean: 테티스가 한 치수 큰 브래지어 찾는 것처럼?
1500000025.english: Like Thetis looking for a bra one size too big?

1500000026.korean: 왜 예시를 들어도 그렇게 드는 건데?!
1500000026.english: Why does even an example make you so uncomfortable?!

1500000027.korean: 하, 무슨 너희들 핫팩이랑 뭐… 이것저것 다해본 것처럼 말한다?
1500000027.english: Ha, are you acting like you've tried every hot pack and whatever else?

1500000028.korean: 풉. 너 합류하기 전에도 이미 해볼 거 다 해봤는데?
1500000028.english: Pfft. You'd already tried everything before you even joined, right?

1500000031.korean: 뭐야, 천아 넌 한 번도 제대로 사령관이랑 진지하게 둘이서 놀아본 적 없어?
1500000031.english: What? CheonA, have you never seriously hung out alone with the Commander?

1500000032.korean: 하… 핫팩이 맨날 바쁘니까 나도 어쩔 수 없던 거지.
1500000032.english: Sigh… Hotpack’s always busy, so I couldn’t help it either.

1500000033.korean:
그러고보니 며칠 전에 장화 말이야…사령관이랑 영화 보러 가던 거 봤었는데. 
사람이 일년 내내 일만하면서 살 순 없잖…
1500000033.english: Come to think of it, a few days ago JangHwa… I saw you two going to a movie. People can’t live working all year round…

1500000034.english: The Commander really does live only for work.

1500000036.english: We should at least try to change things up, right?

1500000037.korean: 으음… 근데 내가 옷 욕심이 없어서… 핫팩이 이걸 좋아하긴 하는데... 이상태로 무턱대고 덜렁 데이트에 나갈 순 없잖아.
1500000037.english: Hmm… but I’m not really into clothes… Hotpack does like this, but I can’t just go on a reckless date like this.

1500000038.korean: …그 유니폼을 입고 데이트에 나갈 생각을 했다고?
1500000038.english: …You thought about going on a date wearing that uniform?

1500000040.english: Ah, I don’t know. I don’t know, I don’t know!

1500000041.korean: 근데 천아, 원래 외부 홍보는 네리만 하는 건데 왜 천아도 같이 나와서 하고 있어?
1500000041.english: But CheonA, usually only Nereid does the external PR—why are you joining in too?

1500000042.korean: …똥강아지 한정판 화보집에 기스 내서 새로 사줘야 해. 참치캔 급하다고.
1500000042.english: …I have to buy a new limited‑edition “Puppy‑poop” photo book because the old one got scratched. It’s as urgent as a can of tuna.

1500000043.korean: 그거 품절이라서 진짜 구하기 어려울 거 같은데?
1500000043.english: That one’s sold out, so it’ll be really hard to get, right?

1500000044.korean: 어떻게든 보상은 해줘야 하니까, 이러는 거지.
1500000044.english: I have to make it up somehow, that’s why I’m doing this.

1500000045.korean: 어? 저거 사령관님 아냐? 사령관님! 여기에요 여기!
1500000045.english: Huh? Isn’t that the Commander? Commander! Over here!

1500000046.korean: - 잠시 바람을 쐬러 나온 난 카페 호라이즌 아르바이트를 하는 대원들과 마주쳤다.
1500000046.english: - I stepped out for a breath of fresh air and ran into the crew working part‑time at Café Horizon.

1500000047.korean: 사정이 있어서... 추가근무 겸 본점 애들 일 도와주는 중이야.
1500000047.english: I have some errands… I’m double‑shifting and helping the main shop staff.

1500000048.korean: 헤헤, 어디가세요 사령관? 지금 브레이크 타임인데 들리시겠어요?
1500000048.english: Hehe, where are you off to, Commander? It’s break time—can you hear me?

1500000049.korean: - 헤실거리며 내게 메뉴판을 가리키는 테티스의 이마에 딱밤을 살짝 박았다.
1500000049.english: - I gave a light tap on the forehead of the flustered Thetis as she pointed at the menu.

1500000050.english: Hii! Why, why are you hitting me!

1500000051.korean: 그럼 사령관. 카페 끝나고 우리랑 놀자, 응?
1500000051.english: Then, Commander, after the café we’ll hang out, okay?

1500000052.korean: - 무언가 기대하는 눈빛으로 가득 찬 네리와 테티스의 눈망울에 나는 어깨를 으쓱했다.
1500000052.english: - With Nereid and Thetis’s eyes full of hopeful anticipation, I shrugged my shoulders.

1500000053.korean: 꺄하핫! 일 다 끝나면 가는 거죠? 그럼 우리 뭐할까요 사령관? 응? 응?
1500000053.english: Kya ha ha! You’ll come after work, right? So what should we do, Commander? Yeah? Yeah?

1500000054.english: Nereid says VR games are fine!

1500000056.korean: 나, 으음… 아무데나 가도 괜찮아. 근데 있잖아 핫팩.
1500000056.english: I… um… I’m fine going anywhere. But, you know, Hotpack.

1500000057.korean: 장화랑 영화관 같이 갔다 왔다면서? 걔 그런 거 별로 안 좋아하지 않아?
1500000057.english: You said you went to the movies with JangHwa, right? Doesn’t she not really like that kind of thing?

1500000058.korean: - 예전의 장화라면 그런 걸 왜 나랑 보러 가냐면서 으르렁 될 게 뻔하지만...
1500000058.english: - If it were the old JangHwa, she’d definitely growl and ask why I’m taking her to see that.

1500000059.korean:
- 장화는 내 손을 꼭 잡은 채, 영화에 끝까지 집중했다. 
남자 주인공이 했던 대사를 따라해 달라며 칭얼거리기까지 했고.
1500000059.english: - JangHwa held my hand tightly, staying focused on the film till the end. She even whined, asking me to repeat the male lead’s lines.

1500000060.korean:
…장화가?
그게 좀 신기하다는 거야 네 입장에선?
1500000060.english: …JangHwa? You find that a bit… fascinating from your point of view?

1500000061.korean:
- 장화는 한때 홍련과 몽구스팀을 혐오하며 다 없애겠다던 복수의 화신으로 불리었다.
그런 장화가 점차 과거의 트라우마를 극복해 나가는데 누가 좋지 않겠는가?
1500000061.english: JangHwa was once dubbed the incarnation of vengeance, despising Hongryeon and the Mongus team and swearing to wipe them out. Who wouldn’t be glad to see that very JangHwa gradually overcoming her past trauma?

1500000062.english: Looks like the hot pack wants a change…?

1500000063.korean: …친구 같거나, 욕하는 모습보단, 역시 조금 살가운 게 좋은 거겠지?
1500000063.english: …maybe being a friend rather than insulting, a little warmth is nicer after all?

1500000064.english: Like Thetis or Nereid…? Or like JangHwa…?

1500000065.korean: - 물론 사람이 바뀌면 듣는 사람도 좋고 다 좋아진다지만… 천아가 바뀌는 건 결이 다른 문제 같다.
1500000065.english: – Sure, when someone changes, it’s pleasant for everyone, but CheonA’s change feels like a whole different issue.

1500000066.korean: - 처음 만났을 때부터 대뜸, 안겨오며 '핫팩'을 해달라고 하지 않나... 인식증을 도둑질 하지 않나.
1500000066.english: – From the moment we first met, she immediately leaned in, asking me for a “hot pack”… as if she were stealing my sense of self.

1500000067.korean: - 천아의 능청스러운 행동이 나쁘다고 생각해 본 적 없지만, 천아의 태도가 살갑게 바뀐다면… 잘 상상이 되지 않는다.
1500000067.english: – I’ve never thought CheonA’s playful antics were bad, but if her attitude turned gentle… I can’t quite picture it.

1500000068.korean: -격식 안 따지고 스스럼없이 다가오는 성격. 그게 천아의 매력 아닐까?
1500000068.english: – A no‑frills, straightforward nature that doesn’t bother with formalities. That’s probably CheonA’s charm.

1500000069.english: What… you’re not even answering my question?

1500000070.korean: 아니! 내가 그런 말 하면 뭐 안 되는 거야?!
1500000070.english: No! What’s so wrong about me saying that?!

1500000071.korean:
- 천아는 떨떠름한 눈빛으로 내 양팔에 매달린 테티스와 네리를 보았다. 
평소와 묘하게 다른 느낌에 위화감을 느끼던 그때였다.
1500000071.english: – CheonA gave Thetis and Nereid, dangling from my arms, a half‑hearted stare. It was then that I sensed an odd unease.

1500000073.english: I actually wanted to go to karaoke…♥

1500000077.korean: 네리는 저렇게 콧소리 안 낸단 말이야…
1500000077.english: Neri never makes a snort like that…

1500000079.korean: - 천아는 뒤도 돌아보지 않고 황급히 뛰어가며 내 시야에서 사라졌다.
1500000079.english: – CheonA bolted away without looking back, vanishing from my sight.
